name: Zhuzhou Feilu High-Tech Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhuzhou Feilu High-Tech Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of metal anti-corrosion and concrete protection products in China. It offers anti-corrosion coatings for high and medium grade metals; waterproof and anti-seepage coatings for concretes; water born paint products for industrial applications; and various protective materials for concrete interfaces. The company's products are used in building projects of railway equipment, engineering machinery, highway traffic equipment, high-speed railways, subways, intercity-rails, construction works of water conservancy, coal mines, salt fields, and other markets. Zhuzhou Feilu High-Tech Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Zhuzhou, China.
